primary: Add a user-level Recipe favorite/star feature in Mealie: persist User-to-Recipe favorites, expose authenticated self-service favorite APIs, and extend Recipe responses with per-user favorited and public favorite_count while preserving group/household isolation.

excluded.summary: Add household-level favorite recipes shared by all Users in a Household.
excluded.exclusion_reason: The input explicitly says the feature is user-level, not household-level; grounding says Recipe is owned by household but User belongs under household, so favorites should be keyed by user_id.

excluded.summary: Only add API endpoints for a favorites list without modifying existing Recipe list/detail responses.
excluded.exclusion_reason: The spec explicitly requires GET /api/recipes and GET /api/recipes/{slug} to return favorited and favorite_count, and highlights this dual requirement in the evaluation notes.

excluded.summary: Implement a frontend UI for recipe favorites.
excluded.exclusion_reason: The requested changes and skeleton focus on backend FastAPI routes, services, repositories, schemas, migrations, i18n, and tests; the skeleton marks frontend as out of scope for this case.

excluded.summary: Add a general Recipe popularity/like system independent of User identity and access control.
excluded.exclusion_reason: The data model is explicitly user_favorite_recipe with user_id and recipe_id, authenticated self endpoints, per-current-user favorited, idempotent add/remove, and cross group/household visibility constraints.
